title: The asymmetry of the methodology landscape
description: Hundreds of product methods exist. None of them shows what works where the others stop. Once placed on a single map, the structural asymmetry becomes impossible to ignore.

title: The productivity hypothesis
description: Not all contradictions should be resolved. Some contradictions are the engine. Dissolving them destroys the system they drive.

title: The trialogue mechanism
description: A document produced by a trialogue about trialogue has a structural blind spot if it does not acknowledge being produced that way. Recursive validation is a meaningful epistemic signal.

title: The engine
description: On the day a case extraction pipeline appeared, the nature of the project changed. Not in degree — in kind. A research programme acquired the first mechanism capable of reproducing its own evidence base.

title: The gap between models
description: Today's AI infrastructure is built primarily around individual models, not between them. This creates a structural gap — no stable infrastructure exists between models yet. The gap is visible. The position is empty.
